sentences.target: On traverse le fleuve par ce pont.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁavɛʁs lə flœv paʁ sə pɔ̃/

translations.fr: On traverse le fleuve par ce pont.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁavɛʁs lə flœv paʁ sə pɔ̃/
translations.en: We’re crossing the river by this bridge.
translations.es: Cruzamos el río por este puente.
translations.de: Wir überqueren den Fluss über diese Brücke.
translations.it: Attraversiamo il fiume su questo ponte.
translations.ru: Мы переходим реку по этому мосту.
translations.pt: Atravessamos o rio por esta ponte.
translations.he: אנחנו חוצים את הנהר דרך הגשר הזה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi băng qua con sông bằng cây cầu này.
translations.nl: We steken de rivier over via deze brug.
translations.uk: Ми переходимо річку через цей міст.
translations.hu: Ezen a hídon kelünk át a folyón.
translations.hi: हम इस पुल से नदी पार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περνάμε το ποτάμι από αυτή τη γέφυρα.
translations.nb: Vi krysser elven over denne broen.
translations.id: Kami menyeberangi sungai lewat jembatan ini.
translations.sv: Vi korsar floden över den här bron.
translations.da: Vi krydser floden over denne bro.
translations.ja: この橋で川を渡っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used here as a generic/colloquial ‘we’; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular (agreeing with ‘on’); takes a direct object (‘le fleuve’) and an oblique complement (‘par ce pont’).
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun ‘fleuve’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘traverse’. Refers to a major river flowing to the sea.
Preposition introducing a means/path complement (‘ce pont’) indicating the route taken.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘pont’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘par’.

sentences.target: Tu peux voir le fleuve depuis ici.
sentences.reading: /ty pø vwaʁ lə flœv dəpɥi isi/

translations.fr: Tu peux voir le fleuve depuis ici.
translations.ipa: /ty pø vwaʁ lə flœv dəpɥi isi/
translations.en: You can see the river from here.
translations.es: Puedes ver el río desde aquí.
translations.de: Von hier aus kannst du den Fluss sehen.
translations.it: Da qui puoi vedere il fiume.
translations.zh-Hans: 从这里可以看到这条河。
translations.pt: Você pode ver o rio daqui.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhìn thấy con sông từ đây.
translations.nl: Van hieruit kun je de rivier zien.
translations.hi: तुम यहाँ से नदी देख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να δεις το ποτάμι από εδώ.
translations.id: Kamu bisa melihat sungai dari sini.
translations.ja: ここから川が見えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of ‘peux’.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive ‘voir’.
Infinitive main verb governed by the modal ‘peux’; takes ‘le fleuve’ as its direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘fleuve’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘voir’.
Preposition marking a point of origin; here spatial (‘from’), introducing ‘ici’.
Adverb of place; complement of the preposition ‘depuis’.

translations.en: I like to picnic near the river.
translations.es: Me gusta hacer picnic cerca del río.
translations.de: Ich picknicke gern in der Nähe des Flusses.
translations.it: Mi piace fare picnic vicino al fiume.
translations.ko: 저는 강 근처에서 소풍하는 것을 좋아해요.
translations.ru: Мне нравится устраивать пикник у реки.
translations.pt: Gosto de fazer piquenique perto do rio.
translations.he: אני אוהב לעשות פיקניק ליד הנהר.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đi dã ngoại gần con sông.
translations.nl: Ik ga graag picknicken bij de rivier.
translations.uk: Мені подобається влаштовувати пікнік біля річки.
translations.hi: मुझे नदी के पास पिकनिक करना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να κάνω πικνίκ κοντά στο ποτάμι.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å ha piknik ved elven.
translations.id: Saya suka piknik di dekat sungai.
translations.sv: Jag tycker om att ha picknick vid floden.
translations.ro: Îmi place să fac picnic lângă râu.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at holde picnic ved floden.
translations.ja: 川のそばでピクニックするのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘j’ (je) attached to the verb ‘aime’, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate governing the infinitive ‘pique-niquer’.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘aimer’ (construction: aimer + infinitif).
Preposition forming the compound preposition ‘près de’ (‘near’); requires ‘de’ before its complement.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the definite complement after ‘près’.
Common noun; object of the prepositional sequence ‘près du’.

sentences.target: Nous longeons le fleuve après le travail.
sentences.reading: /nu lɔ̃ʒɔ̃ lə flœv apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Nous longeons le fleuve après le travail.
translations.ipa: /nu lɔ̃ʒɔ̃ lə flœv apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/
translations.en: We walk along the river after work.
translations.es: Caminamos junto al río después del trabajo.
translations.de: Nach der Arbeit gehen wir am Fluss entlang.
translations.it: Dopo il lavoro camminiamo lungo il fiume.
translations.yue: 放工之後我哋沿住河邊散步。
translations.ru: После работы мы идем вдоль реки.
translations.pt: Depois do trabalho, caminhamos ao longo do rio.
translations.he: אחרי העבודה אנחנו הולכים לאורך הנהר.
translations.vi: Sau giờ làm, chúng tôi đi dạo dọc theo con sông.
translations.ar: بعد العمل نمشي على طول النهر.
translations.nl: Na het werk lopen we langs de rivier.
translations.uk: Після роботи ми йдемо вздовж річки.
translations.hu: Munka után a folyó mentén sétálunk.
translations.hi: काम के बाद हम नदी के किनारे टहलते हैं.
translations.el: Μετά τη δουλειά περπατάμε κατά μήκος του ποταμού.
translations.nb: Etter jobb går vi langs elven.
translations.id: Setelah kerja, kami berjalan di sepanjang sungai.
translations.sv: Efter jobbet promenerar vi längs floden.
translations.ro: După serviciu, mergem pe lângă râu.
translations.da: Efter arbejde går vi langs floden.
translations.ja: 仕事のあとに川沿いを歩きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of ‘longeons’.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; means ‘to go along / follow the length of’ (a river, road, etc.).
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘fleuve’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘longeons’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘le travail’).
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘travail’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘après’ (temporal complement).
